title: Harris 101092201 Essentials Mini Roller Set for Walls & Ceilings with Tray and Frame, 4” Emulsion & Gloss Roller Sleeves
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Essentials 4 inch mini roller set is ideal for general painting with emulsion & gloss paint
Great for painting smaller areas of walls & ceilings and woodwork as 1 of each emulsion sleeve and gloss sleeve is in the set
To get the most out of this 4 inch mini gloss roller rub it with a clean hand before use to remove any dust particles Do not wet
description: From the manufacturer Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Everyday Mini Roller Set For Painting Small Areas of Walls, Ceilings and Gloss Whats Included Contents 1 x 4" Roller Frame 1 x 4" Emulsion Roller Sleeve for Walls & Ceilings 1 x 4" Gloss Roller Sleeve for Interior Woodwork 1 x 4" Roller Tray Doing a Project Don't forget.....to get the same paint finish team your 4" Essentials Roller Set up with the 9" Essentials Walls & Ceilings Roller Set and Essentials Walls & Ceilings and Gloss Paint Brushes. Everyday Mini Roller Set For use when painting smaller areas on walls & ceilings and woodwork. Before use rinse the emulsion roller sleeve to remove any loose fibres and rub gloss roller sleeve to remove any dust. After use wash the emulsion sleeve in warm water to remove any excess paint and clean gloss sleeve in accordance to paint manufacturer's guidelines. Allow to dry naturally, standing up. Extend Your Reach Looking to extend your reach - simply attach the roller frame to a Harris Extension Pole with a push fit attachment. Three Quality Levels to Choose From Harris Essentials Painting & Decorating Tools Range The Essentials range is a straightforward selection of basic yet reliable decorating and painting tools, that help you get those painting jobs done in a quick & easy way. Offers excellent value for money and gives you all the decorating and painting tools you need when on a budget. Harris Seriously Good Painting & Decorating Tools Range Seriously Good is our mid-range of decorating and painting tools, offering quality paint brushes, paint rollers and decorating and painting tools that perform well without too much effort Harris Ultimate Painting & Decorating Tools Range Superior in quality, look and feel, the Ultimate range is our best decorating and painting tools range. It combines innovative materials so the paint brushes and paint rollers give an excellent paint finish whilst making your decorating task easier HARRIS ESSENTIALS WALLS & CEILINGS 4" TWIN SLEEVE PAINT ROLLER SET HARRIS SERIOUSLY GOOD 4" TWIN SLEEVE WALLS & CEILINGS PAINT ROLLER SET HARRIS ULTIMATE 4" WALLS & CEILINGS PAINT ROLLER SET Buying Options Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 3,761 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,665 4.4 out of 5 stars 761 Price — no data £6.34 £ 6 . 34 — no data Soft Grip Handle X ✓ ✓ Ideal for painting Walls & Ceilings semi smooth smooth/semi smooth smooth / semi smooth Replacement Sleeves available to purchase separately X ✓ ✓ Sleeve Type Knitted & Foam Woven Microfibre Expected paint coverage compared to other Harris rollers Good Better Best Splatter compared to other Harris Rollers Some A Little Very Little Compatible with Harris Extension Poles ✓ ✓ ✓
